# EDN Crystals Logistics Limited

## Overview
EDN Crystals Logistics Limited is a Tanzania-based logistics company headquartered in Dar es Salaam. The company provides clearing and forwarding, customs clearance, air and sea freight, loose cargo, warehousing support, biological-sample movement and door-to-door logistics services for clients in Tanzania, across Africa and internationally.

## Website
- URL: https://www.edencrystals.co.tz
- Brand: EDN Crystals Logistics Limited
- Tagline: Your Solution for Logistics and Customs Clearance

## Core Services
- Clearing and Forwarding
- Customs Clearance
- Sea Freight
- Air Freight
- Loose Cargo and LCL
- Warehousing Support
- Logistics and Distribution
- Biological Sample Movement
- Importer and Exporter of Record
- Logistics Consultancy

## Industries Served
- General Trade
- Manufacturing and Distribution
- Import and Export Businesses
- Automotive and Vehicle Importation
- Pharmaceutical and Biopharmaceutical
- Clinical Research
- Laboratories and Medical Operations
- International Organizations
- Small and Medium-Sized Enterprises
- Dangerous-Goods Shippers

## Contact
- Address: 3rd Floor, Office No. 302, Mavuno House, Azikiwe Street, Dar es Salaam, Tanzania
- Postal: P.O. Box 180003, Dar es Salaam, Tanzania
- Telephone: +255 747 824444 / +255 713 259192
- Email: info@edencrystals.co.tz
- Operating Hours: Monday – Friday, 08:00 – 17:00 EAT

## Important Notes
- Specific warehouse locations, capacity and storage conditions are reviewed individually for each shipment.
- Handling, packaging, temperature-control and certification requirements for biological and dangerous goods are reviewed individually for each shipment.
- Duty-free exemption guidance is provided where applicable and should be confirmed against current customs regulations.
